description:
This is a structured summary of a B4J project generated for AI assistants.

The bundle is optimized to allow AI systems to analyze, debug, explain and refactor the project without requiring access to the original IDE.
The bundle should be treated as the authoritative representation of the project state at generation time.

It includes:
- full code modules as raw source code
- extracted public APIs (methods, properties, events)
- layout files converted to JSON
- libraries and related documentation
- IDE state and build configuration
- logs and compilation information
- project files and metadata

Sections are intentionally ordered to provide high-level project context before detailed implementation code.

The caret position may indicate the area currently being edited or investigated.
Useful links reference authoritative B4X resources and best-practice guides which may be consulted when evaluating framework usage or architectural decisions.
B4X applications are event-driven and may rely on asynchronous patterns such as resumable subs and Wait For events.
Sensitive information such as API keys may be automatically sanitized.

Generated by B4X CodeBundle tool v1.0

libraries.snippet:
### jShell library by Erel
### 08/27/2025
[B4X Forum - B4J - Libraries](https://www.b4x.com/android/forum/threads/34661/)

The jShell library allows you to start other programs. It is based on Apache Commons Exec project: <http://commons.apache.org/proper/commons-exec/index.html>  
  
The programs are always started asynchronously. ProcessComplete event is raised when the process completes.  
  
The following code will run the Java program we [previously created](https://www.b4x.com/android/forum/threads/non-ui-applications.34657/):  
  

```B4X
Sub AppStart (Args() As String)  
   Dim shl As Shell  
   shl.Initialize("shl", "java", _  
     Array As String("-cp", "curl.jar", "b4j.example.main", "http://www.b4x.com"))  
   shl.WorkingDirectory = "C:\Users\H\Documents\B4J\Curl\Objects"  
   shl.Run(10000) 'set a timeout of 10 seconds  
   StartMessageLoop 'need to call this as this is a console app.  
End Sub  
  
  
Sub shl_ProcessCompleted (Success As Boolean, ExitCode As Int, StdOut ...

code_modules.name: Main
code_modules.code:
'Non-UI application (console / server application)
#Region Project Attributes 
	#CommandLineArgs:
	#MergeLibraries: True 
#End Region

Sub Process_Globals
	Private Const PLAYER_JAR As String = "fonfm.jar"
	Private Const STAGED_PLAYER_JAR As String = "_fonfm.jar"
	Private Const PLAYER_BACKUP_JAR As String = "fonfm.jar.bak"
	Private Const PLAYER_ARGUMENT As String = "host"
	Private Const HOST_LOG_FILE As String = "host.log"
	Private Const EXIT_STOP As Int = 100
	Private Const EXIT_APPLY_UPDATE As Int = 200
	Private Const EXIT_RESTART As Int = 201
	Private Const FAST_RESTART_DELAY_MS As Int = 1000
	Private Const SLOW_RESTART_DELAY_MS As Int = 60000
	Private playerShell As Shell
	Private consecutiveUnexpectedExitCount As Int
End Sub

Sub AppStart (Args() As String)
	TraceLog("host start dir=" & File.DirApp)
	ApplyPendingUpdateIfNeeded
	StartPlayer
	StartMessageLoop
End Sub

Private Sub StartPlayer
	If File.Exists(File.DirApp, PLAYER_JAR) = False Then
		TraceLog("player not found file=" & PLAYER_JAR)
		ExitApplication
		Return
	End If
	If playerShell.IsInitialized Then
		Try
			playerShell.KillProcess
		Catch
		End Try
	End If
	playerShell.Initialize("PlayerShell", "java", Array As String("-jar", PLAYER_JAR, PLAYER_ARGUMENT))
	playerShell.WorkingDirectory = File.DirApp
	playerShell.Run(-1)
	TraceLog("player start file=" & PLAYER_JAR)
End Sub

Private Sub PlayerShell_ProcessCompleted (Success As Boolean, ExitCode As Int, StdOut As String, StdErr As String)
	HandlePlayerExitAsync(Success, ExitCode, StdOut, StdErr)
End Sub

Private Sub HandlePlayerExitAsync(success As Boolean, exitCode As Int, stdOut As String, stdErr As String) As ResumableSub
	TraceLog("player exit code=" & exitCode & " success=" & success & " stderr=" & SanitizeForLog(stdErr))
	Select exitCode
		Case EXIT_STOP
			TraceLog("host stop requested")
			ExitApplication
		Case EXIT_APPLY_UPDATE
			consecutiveUnexpectedExitCount = 0
			ApplyPendingUpdateIfNeeded
			Wait For (RestartAfterDelay(FAST_RESTART_DELAY_MS, "apply_update")) Complete (unused As Boolean)
		Case EXIT_RESTART
			consecutiveUnexpectedExitCount = 0
			Wait For (RestartAfterDelay(FAST_RESTART_DELAY_MS, "restart")) Complete (unused As Boolean)
		Case Else
			consecutiveUnexpectedExitCount = consecutiveUnexpectedExitCount + 1
			Dim restartDelayMs As Int = IIf(consecutiveUnexpectedExitCount < 5, FAST_RESTART_DELAY_MS, SLOW_RESTART_DELAY_MS)
			Wait For (RestartAfterDelay(restartDelayMs, "unexpected_exit")) Complete (unused As Boolean)
	End Select
	Return True
End Sub

Private Sub RestartAfterDelay(delayMs As Int, reason As String) As ResumableSub
	TraceLog("restart scheduled reason=" & reason & " delayMs=" & delayMs)
	Sleep(delayMs)
	ApplyPendingUpdateIfNeeded
	StartPlayer
	Return True
End Sub

' Применяет staged update только вне процесса player.
' Host копирует _fonfm.jar в fonfm.jar, а при наличии старой версии сохраняет резервную копию.
Private Sub ApplyPendingUpdateIfNeeded As Boolean
	If File.Exists(File.DirApp, STAGED_PLAYER_JAR) = False Then Return False
	Dim stagedSize As Long = File.Size(File.DirApp, STAGED_PLAYER_JAR)
	If stagedSize <= 0 Then
		TraceLog("ignoring empty staged update file=" & STAGED_PLAYER_JAR)
		File.Delete(File.DirApp, STAGED_PLAYER_JAR)
		Return False
	End If
	Try
		If File.Exists(File.DirApp, PLAYER_BACKUP_JAR) Then
			File.Delete(File.DirApp, PLAYER_BACKUP_JAR)
		End If
		If File.Exists(File.DirApp, PLAYER_JAR) Then
			File.Copy(File.DirApp, PLAYER_JAR, File.DirApp, PLAYER_BACKUP_JAR)
			File.Delete(File.DirApp, PLAYER_JAR)
		End If
		File.Copy(File.DirApp, STAGED_PLAYER_JAR, File.DirApp, PLAYER_JAR)
		If File.Exists(File.DirApp, PLAYER_JAR) = False Or File.Size(File.DirApp, PLAYER_JAR) <> stagedSize Then
			TraceLog("update apply failed size mismatch staged=" & stagedSize & " player=" & SafeFileSize(PLAYER_JAR))
			RestoreBackupIfNeeded
			Return False
		End If
		File.Delete(File.DirApp, STAGED_PLAYER_JAR)
		TraceLog("update applied size=" & stagedSize)
		Return True
	Catch
		TraceLog("update apply error=" & LastException.Message)
		RestoreBackupIfNeeded
		Return False
	End Try
End Sub

Private Sub RestoreBackupIfNeeded
	If File.Exists(File.DirApp, PLAYER_BACKUP_JAR) = False Then Return
	Try
		If File.Exists(File.DirApp, PLAYER_JAR) Then
			File.Delete(File.DirApp, PLAYER_JAR)
		End If
		File.Copy(File.DirApp, PLAYER_BACKUP_JAR, File.DirApp, PLAYER_JAR)
		TraceLog("backup restored")
	Catch
		TraceLog("backup restore error=" & LastException.Message)
	End Try
End Sub

Private Sub SafeFileSize(fileName As String) As Long
	If File.Exists(File.DirApp, fileName) = False Then Return -1
	Return File.Size(File.DirApp, fileName)
End Sub

Private Sub SanitizeForLog(value As String) As String
	Dim text As String = value
	If text = Null Then text = ""
	text = text.Replace(CRLF, " | ").Replace(Chr(10), " | ").Replace(Chr(13), " | ").Trim
	If text.Length > 500 Then text = text.SubString2(0, 500)
	Return text
End Sub

Private Sub TraceLog(text As String)
	If text = "" Then Return
	Dim tw As TextWriter
	tw.Initialize(File.OpenOutput(File.DirApp, HOST_LOG_FILE, True))
	tw.Write(DateTime.Date(DateTime.Now) & " " & DateTime.Time(DateTime.Now) & " " & text & CRLF)
	tw.Close
	Log(text)
End Sub

'Return true to allow the default exceptions handler to handle the uncaught exception.
Sub Application_Error (Error As Exception, StackTrace As String) As Boolean
	TraceLog("application error=" & Error.Message)
	Return True
End Sub
